announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Sammaan Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'This is further to our intimations dated October 2, 2025, October 29, 2025, November 7, 2025 and December 10, 2025, with respect to the proposed acquisition of controlling stake in Sammaan Capital Limited (formerly known as Indiabulls Housing Finance Limited) ( Company ) by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd ( Investor ), which is owned and controlled by International Holding Company PJSC ( Proposed Transaction ). Pursuant to applicable provisions of the Listing Regulations, we wish to inform that the Reserve Bank of India ( RBI ) has, vide its letter dated March 24, 2026, approved the applications made by the Company and Sammaan Finserve Limited (formerly known as Indiabulls Commercial Credit Limited) ( SFL ) (i.e., wholly owned subsidiary of the Company) respectively, in respect of undertaking the Proposed Transaction, including indirect change of control of SFL pursuant to the Proposed Transaction. The RBI has also allowed the Company and SFL s request for waiver of the public notice period.Pursuant to the Proposed Transaction, the Investor proposes to invest an aggregate amount of approximately INR 8,849,99,99,794/- (Indian Rupees Eight Thousand Eight Hundred and Forty‑Nine Crore Ninety‑Nine Lakh Ninety‑Nine Thousand Seven Hundred and Ninety‑Four only), by way of preferential issue.Upon completion of the preferential issue, the Acquirer shall hold approximately 41.23%(1) of the paid‑up equity share capital of the Company. Further, upon completion of the preferential issue and the Open Offer, and assuming full uptake in the Open Offer, the Acquirer shall hold approximately 63.36%(2) of the paid‑up equity share capital of the Company.The only regulatory approvals pending for consummation of the Proposed Transaction are from the Securities and Exchange Board of India ( SEBI ), for which the Company and the Investor are in active engagement with the SEBI to ensure expeditious receipt of the approvals, towards timely completion of the Proposed Transaction.The Proposed Transaction will be effected in accordance with the terms of the share subscription agreement dated October 2, 2025 entered into between the Company and the Investor, and fulfilment of other contractual conditions. Request you to kindly take the same on record. '.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Infosys Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Infosys and University of Nottingham Extend Strategic Collaboration to Strengthen Digital Infrastructure for Student Management System'.
announcements.ai_summary: Infosys Limited, in collaboration with the University of Nottingham, has extended their strategic partnership to enhance the university's digital infrastructure for its Student Management System. This extended collaboration, leveraging Infosys Cobalt and Infosys Topaz Fabric, aims to modernize digital services and improve cloud capabilities for the university's global campuses in the UK, Malaysia, and China. The partnership builds upon a successful relationship that began in 2017. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, and the details will be available on Infosys's website, www.infosys.com.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: COMPLIANCE OF REGULATION 30 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015- INTIMATION ABOUT EXECUTION OF MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING (MOU) WITH GOVERNMENT OF BIHAR
announcements.ai_summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Limited (MTNL) has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the Government of Bihar on March 24, 2026. Under this agreement, MTNL will transfer the leasehold rights of seven residential properties located in the Asian Games Village Complex, New Delhi, to the Government of Bihar. The agreed valuation for these properties is Rs 68.43 Crore. This transfer is contingent upon MTNL receiving the necessary Non-Objection Certificate (NOC) from the Delhi Development Authority (DDA) and executing the Lease Transfer Deed. Further approvals from the DDA and other relevant authorities are also required to finalize the transaction.

announcements.subject: Capacity addition
announcements.detail: Maruti Suzuki India Limited has informed the Exchange about Capacity addition
announcements.ai_summary: Maruti Suzuki India Limited's Board has approved the first phase of capacity addition at its Khoraj Industrial Estate site, aiming to add 2,50,000 vehicles per annum by 2029. This expansion is in addition to its existing capacity of 24 Lac units per annum across Gurugram, Manesar, Kharkhoda, and Hansalpur, which is currently fully utilized. The company is acquiring land for this expansion from Gujarat Industrial Development Corporation. The investment required for this first phase is INR 10,000 Crores. The company will provide further updates as market conditions evolve and the project progresses.

announcements.subject: Diversification/Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Asahi India Glass Limited has informed the Exchange about Disinvestment
announcements.ai_summary: Asahi India Glass Limited's subsidiary, AIS Consumer Glass Solutions Limited ("CG"), has approved the sale of its entire 34% stake in Under Par Sports Technologies Private Limited ("Target Company"). The Target Company is an associate of CG and an indirect associate of Asahi India Glass Limited. This divestment, approved on March 24, 2026, will result in the Target Company ceasing to be an associate of CG and an indirect associate of Asahi India Glass Limited. The transaction details are in accordance with SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD- POD2/1/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Capacity addition
announcements.detail: Godawari Power And Ispat limited has informed the Exchange about Approval for Setting up of   1.00 MTPA Integrated Steel Plant.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power and Ispat Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the establishment of a new Integrated Steel Plant with a capacity of 1.00 Million tons per annum. This plant will produce heavy and medium section structural steel and wire rods, aiming to strengthen the company's presence in the steel sector and capitalize on growing demand. The plant will be located at village Sarora, Tehsil Tilda, District Raipur, Chhattisgarh, approximately 50 KMs from Raipur. The estimated cost for this project is Rs.7000 Crores, to be funded equally through debt and equity (internal accruals) in a 1:1 ratio. The meeting commenced at 12:30 PM and concluded at 1:50 PM.

This transaction is in accordance with Regulation 29(1) and 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and is covered by an exemption order from SEBI dated January 27, 2026. Importantly, the aggregate holding of the Promoter and Promoter Group remains unchanged, with no impact on the control and management of Tega Industries Limited.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Future Consumer Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on NCLT hearing   SBI Vs Future Consumer Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Future Consumer Limited provided an update on the NCLT hearing concerning the case filed by State Bank of India ('SBI'). In a hearing on March 24, 2026, SBI, the financial creditor, withdrew part of its claim and revised its interest component due to an error in computation. The Hon’ble Tribunal granted SBI two weeks to file an amended form-1 by way of an affidavit, with one week thereafter for Future Consumer Limited to file its reply. The matter has been adjourned to April 23, 2026. This update follows the company's earlier disclosure on February 16, 2026, regarding the NCLT filing.

announcements.ai_summary: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced the re-appointment of two Independent Directors, Mr. Vijay Keshav Gokhale and Dr. Vidya Rajiv Yeravdekar, effective April 16, 2026. Mr. Gokhale will serve a second term of 5 consecutive years, while Dr. Yeravdekar will serve a second term of 3 consecutive years. These re-appointments were approved by the company's members through a postal ballot process, including remote e-voting. This announcement follows a previous intimation dated February 04, 2026, and is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power and Ispat Limited (GPIL) has completed the second tranche of its stake disposal in Ardent Steel Private Limited (ASPL), transferring 2,00,000 equity shares for Rs 6.60 Crores on March 24, 2026. This transfer represents 2.52% of ASPL's equity. Following this transaction, GPIL's stake in ASPL has been diluted from 20.98% to 18.46%, resulting in ASPL ceasing to be an associate company of GPIL effective March 24, 2026. This action is in continuation of the company's earlier announcements on February 06, 2026, and March 06, 2026, regarding the disposal of its entire 37.85% stake for a total consideration of Rs 90.87 Crores, subject to statutory and contractual requirements.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Godawari Power And Ispat limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Godawari Power and Ispat Limited, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the establishment of a new Integrated Steel Plant with an annual capacity of 1.00 Million tons per annum. This plant will produce heavy and medium section structural steel and wire rods, strengthening the company's position in the steel sector. The project, to be located at village Sarora, Tehsil Tilda, District Raipur, Chhattisgarh, is estimated to cost Rs 7000 Crores and will be funded equally through debt and equity (internal accruals) in a 1:1 ratio. The meeting commenced at 12:30 PM and concluded at 1:50 PM.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: K.P. Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Press Release titled   KP Group surpasses 1 GW energised IPP capacity milestone'.
announcements.ai_summary: K.P. Energy Limited has issued a press release announcing that the KP Group has surpassed a significant milestone of 1 GW in energised Independent Power Producer (IPP) capacity. This achievement is part of the Group's total IPP portfolio of 2.3 GW and signifies strong progress in its long-term growth strategy focused on IPP development. Since FY21, the Group has experienced approximately 18x growth in energised capacity, from 58 MW to over 1 GW. This scale-up reflects a strategic focus on building a high-quality, owned IPP portfolio with strong execution discipline, with particularly strong momentum observed in FY26.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: KPI Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Press Release titled  KP Group surpasses 1 GW energised IPP capacity milestone . The disclosure is attached herewith'.
announcements.ai_summary: KPI Green Energy Limited has announced that the KP Group has achieved a significant milestone by surpassing 1 GW of energised Independent Power Producer (IPP) capacity. This milestone is out of the Group's total IPP portfolio of 2.3 GW and marks a key step in its long-term growth strategy focused on IPP development. The Group has demonstrated substantial growth, achieving approximately 18x growth in energised capacity since FY21, when it stood at 58 MW. This expansion highlights the Group's commitment to building a high-quality, owned IPP portfolio with robust execution, and the momentum in FY26 has been particularly strong.

This has been rectified, resulting in a reduction in Non-Current Financial Assets and Total Assets.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Zinc Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel Partner to Scale Low-Carbon ZincSolutions with EcoZen".
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited and Tata Steel are partnering to scale low-carbon zinc solutions with a product called EcoZen. This collaboration aims to reduce value-chain emissions, as EcoZen offers over 75% lower carbon intensity than conventional zinc. The partnership builds on a long-standing relationship supporting critical infrastructure projects.

The funding was completed on March 21, 2026, for the interest payment due on March 24, 2026.

announcements.detail: The Federal Bank  Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of Equity Shares on exercise of Stock options pursuant to Employee Stock Option Scheme
announcements.ai_summary: The Federal Bank Limited has allotted 6,100 equity shares under the ESOS 2010 Scheme and 2,11,112 equity shares under the ESOS 2017 Scheme on March 23, 2026. These allotments were made upon the exercise of stock options by option grantees. The face value of each equity share is Rs. 2/-.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "ICONiQ White Whisky Makes History: World s Fastest Growing MillionaireSpirits Brand Crosses 10 Million Cases Milestone.".
announcements.ai_summary: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has issued a press release announcing that its ICONiQ White Whisky has crossed the 10 million cases milestone. The brand is described as the world's fastest-growing millionaire spirits brand. The press release is dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Shalby Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Inaugurationof Oncology Department along with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital'.
announcements.ai_summary: Shalby Limited has inaugurated an Oncology Department with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital in Ahmedabad. This expansion aims to provide comprehensive, integrated cancer care under one roof. The department is equipped with advanced technology and an experienced team of oncologists for specialized diagnosis and treatment.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Gudhi Padwa sales update for the Financial Year 2025-2026.
announcements.ai_summary: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited reported a significant increase in Gudhi Padwa sales for FY 2025-2026, reaching Rs. 73.004 million. This represents a 2.51 times year-on-year growth compared to Rs. 20.818 million in the previous year's Gudhi Padwa sales.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Commencement of commercial production of 4,500 MTPA".
announcements.ai_summary: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited announced the commencement of commercial production for an additional 4,500 MTPA capacity on March 23, 2026. This brownfield expansion for soluble coffee is located at a wholly-owned subsidiary's facility near Rachur Village, Telangana, increasing the company's total installed production capacity.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Time Technoplast Limited has informed the Exchange that Power Build Batteries Private Limited, Subsidiary of the Company receives Central Power Research Institute (CPRI) Certification of Successful Test Completion for OPzS Stationary Batteries.
announcements.ai_summary: Time Technoplast Limited's subsidiary, Power Build Batteries Private Limited, has received a Certificate of Successful Test Completion from the Central Power Research Institute (CPRI). The certification is for its OPzS stationary batteries (Tubular Batteries) in transparent SAN containers, tested under standard IS 1651:2013.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Euro Pratik Sales Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of Chawla Brothers
announcements.ai_summary: Euro Pratik Sales Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of a 51% stake in Chawla Brothers, a partnership firm based in Jalandhar and Ludhiana. The total investment for this acquisition amounts to Rs. 32.20 crore.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: IFGL Refractories Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: IFGL Refractories Limited has resumed operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility in Gujarat. The facility, located at Plot Nos. 638-644, Kandla Special Economic Zone, had been impacted by Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG) supply issues. All product lines at the Kandla works are now functional.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Kokuyo Camlin Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: Kokuyo Camlin Limited has received an order from the DS Income Tax assessment unit, National faceless unit, India. The order pertains to a demand for Income Tax along with interest and penalty, issued under sections 147/143(3) read with section 144B of the Income Tax Act, 1961. The company received this communication on March 21, 2025.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Operationalization of Projects'.
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has operationalized an aggregate of 510.1 MW power projects at Khavda, Gujarat, through its stepdown subsidiaries. This commissioning has increased AGEL’s total operational renewable generation capacity to 17,982.3 MW. The decision to operationalize these plants and commence power generation was made on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: P N Gadgil Jewellers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Store opening'.
announcements.ai_summary: P N Gadgil Jewellers Limited has opened two new stores on March 22, 2026. One store is located at The Nextation Building, Kolhapur, Maharashtra, and the other is a Franchise Owned, Company Operated (FOCO) model store in Ghatkopar East, Mumbai. Following these openings, the company's total store count has reached 75.

announcements.subject: General Updates

announcements.ai_summary: Jtekt India Limited has received an Assessment Order from the Office of the Income Tax Authority. The company has provided the requisite information as per Schedule III under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations. This update is for the record.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Goa Carbon Limited has informed the Exchange about the temporary shut-down of the Company's Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work.
announcements.ai_summary: Goa Carbon Limited has temporarily shut down its Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work. The unit is located at Vill. Udayabata, Paradeepgarh, Dist. Jagatsinghpur, Odisha. The shutdown commenced on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates

announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the exchange about an update from its material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: RITES Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: RITES Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance from Research Designs and Standards Organisation (RDSO), Lucknow. The contract is for the comprehensive maintenance of a dedicated test track between Gudha and Thathana Mithri stations in the Jodhpur division of NWR.

announcements.subject: Fino Payments Bank Ltd - 543386 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 SEBI LODR
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order from Hon''ble High Court of Telangana
announcements.ai_summary: Fino Payments Bank Ltd has received an order from the Hon'ble High Court of Telangana on March 24, 2026, dismissing a Writ Petition filed by Mr. Rishi Gupta, MD & CEO, challenging his arrest. This order follows earlier disclosures made by the bank on February 27, 2026. The bank acknowledges the court's decision and is considering appropriate legal recourse. The ongoing investigation pertains to program managers associated with multiple banks, including Fino Payments Bank. The bank will provide further updates as legal proceedings progress.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Board Meeting Intimation for Fund Raising/Other Business Matters
announcements.detail: Manappuram Finance Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 30/03/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve the borrowing program including issuance of redeemable non-convertible debentures, notes, bonds and other debt securities in the onshore and/or offshore markets by way of private placement and/or public issue and other permissible modes of borrowing for the Financial Year 2026-27.
announcements.ai_summary: Manappuram Finance Ltd's Board of Directors will meet on March 30, 2026, to consider and approve the company's borrowing program for the Financial Year 2026-27. This program includes the issuance of redeemable non-convertible debentures, notes, bonds, and other debt securities. These securities may be issued through private placement, public issue, or other permissible modes in both onshore and offshore markets. The company is seeking to raise funds to support its operations and growth for the upcoming financial year.

announcements.subject: HDFC Bank Ltd - 500180 - Board Meeting Intimation for Approval Of The Audited Standalone Financial Results Of HDFC Bank Limited For The Quarter/Year Ended March 31, 2026, Audited Consolidated Financial Results For The Quarter/ Year Ending March 31, 2026 And Other Important Matters
announcements.detail: HDFC Bank Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 18/04/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve audited standalone financial results of HDFC Bank Limitedfor the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026, audited consolidated financial results for the quarter/ year ending March 31, 2026 and other important matters
announcements.ai_summary: HDFC Bank Ltd will convene a Board Meeting on April 18, 2026, to approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the recommendation of dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26 and fix the record date for the same. The trading window for the bank's securities will be closed from March 25, 2026, until the financial results are announced. This meeting is crucial for investors to assess the bank's financial performance.

announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Ltd has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) on March 24, 2026, for the proposed acquisition of a controlling stake by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd. announcements.subject: Sanathan Textiles Ltd - 544314 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition

announcements.ai_summary: Sanathan Textiles Ltd.'s wholly-owned subsidiary, Sanathan Polycot Private Limited (SPPL), has entered into agreements to acquire a 26% stake in Serentica Renewables India 33 Private Limited. This acquisition, for sourcing renewable power with a contracted capacity of 32 MW, is structured through a Share Subscription and Shareholders’ Agreement and a Power Supply and Consumption Agreement. The deal is subject to conditions precedent and regulatory approvals, with completion expected in line with agreed tranche timelines.

announcements.subject: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd - 500247 - Update On Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. has announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited (KMIL), will cease to sanction new loans from April 1, 2026. This decision, approved by KMIL's Board of Directors on March 24, 2026, aims to simplify the group structure and enhance operational synergies, in compliance with RBI Directions. KMIL will continue to service its existing facilities. The business activities of KMIL will be conducted departmentally within Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. going forward.

This development is part of PFL's growth journey during FY26, indicating a strengthening financial position for the company. Investors should monitor how this improved credit rating may impact future funding opportunities and operational expansion.

These shares will be issued at a premium of Rs. 4990 each on a private placement basis. The valuation for this conversion was based on a report by Mr. Nitin Goyal.

announcements.subject: Tata Capital Ltd - 544574 - Board Meeting Intimation for Board Meeting Intimation For Considering And Approving The Audited Standalone And Consolidated Financial Results Of The Company For The Quarter And Year Ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.detail: Tata Capital Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 23/04/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results of the Company for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Capital Ltd will hold a Board Meeting on April 23, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will be closed from March 24, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of these results.

announcements.subject: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust - 543290 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust (PGInvIT) announced the closure of its trading window from March 31, 2026. This closure will remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of PGInvIT's financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. This is in accordance with the company's policy on Unpublished Price Sensitive Information.

announcements.subject: Cosmic CRF Ltd - 543928 - Board Meeting Intimation for Intimation For Meeting Of The Board Of Directors Of The Company In Terms Of Regulation 29 Of SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015
announcements.detail:
Cosmic CRF Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 26/03/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve 1. To consider and approve the conversion of 18,600 Nos. of Share Warrants issued to Promoter Group into Equity Shares of the Company;
2. To consider and approve the allotment of 18,600 Nos. of Equity Shares upon conversion of Convertible Warrants.
announcements.ai_summary: Cosmic CRF Ltd's Board of Directors will meet on March 26, 2026, to consider and approve the conversion of 18,600 share warrants issued to the Promoter Group into equity shares. The meeting will also consider and approve the allotment of these 18,600 equity shares upon the conversion of these warrants.

announcements.subject: Maruti Interior Products Ltd - 543464 - Right Issue Committee Meeting
announcements.detail: Right issue committee meeting
announcements.ai_summary: Maruti Interior Products Ltd has extended the closing date of its ongoing Rights Issue of 4,53,00,000 Equity Shares. The Rights Issue closing date has been moved from March 24, 2026, to April 6, 2026. Trading in Rights Entitlements (REs) on the stock exchange will remain suspended as per the earlier schedule.

announcements.subject: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd - 544447 - Voluntary Disclosure - Acquisition Of Equity Shares Of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited ('The Company') By Promoter.
announcements.detail: Voluntary Disclosure - Acquisition of Equity Shares of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited ("the company") by Promoter
announcements.ai_summary: SNS Infrarealty LLP, the Promoter of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited, has acquired equity shares of the company from the open market. This acquisition represents less than 2% of the total shareholding or voting rights. The company is voluntarily disclosing this information for transparency, as it does not trigger mandatory disclosure requirements under SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Emkay Global Financial Services Ltd - 532737 - Proceedings Of Postal Ballot
announcements.detail: Proceedings of Postal Ballot
announcements.ai_summary: Emkay Global Financial Services Ltd has announced the proceedings of its postal ballot, specifically the scrutinizer's report on remote e-voting results. The special resolution sought consent from members for the appointment of Mr. Raunak Karwa as a Whole-Time Director, designated as Executive Director for three years, and for the payment of his remuneration.

announcements.subject: Regency Fincorp Ltd - 540175 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 25000 Listed, Secured, Rated, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures
announcements.ai_summary: Regency Fincorp Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the allotment of 25,000 Listed, Secured, Rated, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs). These NCDs have a face value of INR 10,000 each, with a 14% interest rate, aggregating to INR 25 Crores. The allotment was made through private placement to identified investors.

announcements.subject: Prabha Energy Ltd - 544379 - Corporate Action-Outcome of Right issue
announcements.detail: Revised Outcome of Rights Issue Committee Meeting held today, i.e. March 23, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Prabha Energy Ltd has issued a corrigendum regarding its Rights Issue Committee Meeting outcome, revising the issue schedule due to a typographical error. The on-market trading in Rights Entitlements (REs) has been extended to March 30, 2026, and the Rights Issue closing date is now April 06, 2026. All other terms of the Rights Issue remain unchanged.

announcements.subject: Reganto Enterprises Ltd - 517393 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press release
announcements.ai_summary: Reganto Enterprises Limited, formerly Vintron Informatics Limited, has announced a strategic expansion into four new business verticals. These include Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) Solutions, IT Systems Integration & Infrastructure, Technology & Corporate Supplies, and Engineering, Procurement & Construction (EPC) Services. This expansion marks a significant transformation for the Delhi-based company with a 35-year legacy.

announcements.subject: Highway Infrastructure Ltd - 544477 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Company has received a work order for the operation at Katiyara Fee plaza.
announcements.ai_summary: Highway Infrastructure Ltd has entered into a Contract Agreement on March 20th, 2026, for the operation of the Katiyara Fee Plaza in Bihar. The company is scheduled to take over the Fee Plaza on April 5th, 2026. This follows a Letter of Acceptance received on February 25th, 2026.

announcements.subject: Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd - 512441 - Board Meeting Outcome for For Meeting Of The Rights Issue Committee Of Enbee Trade & Finance Limited Under Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (LODR) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: The Rights Issue Committee in their meeting held today, i.e., Monday March 23, 2026, inter alia, has considered, that the last Date for receipt of applications in the ongoing ''Rights Issue'' of the Company has been extended from Friday, March 27, 2026 to Friday, April 10, 2026. We request you to kindly take this on record.
announcements.ai_summary: The Rights Issue Committee of Enbee Trade & Finance Limited has extended the last date for receiving applications for its ongoing Rights Issue. The deadline has been moved from March 27th, 2026, to April 10th, 2026. Consequently, the last date for renunciation through on-market transfer is now April 7th, 2026.

announcements.subject: Brainbees Solutions Ltd - 544226 - Response To The Volume Movement Letter Issued By BSE Vide E-Mail Dated March 23, 2026
announcements.detail: Response to the volume movement letter issued by BSE vide e-mail dated March 23, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Brainbees Solutions Ltd has responded to a BSE query regarding increased trading volume in its securities. The company stated that all material information has been duly disclosed to the stock exchanges and its website. Brainbees Solutions Ltd believes the volume movement is market-driven and will continue to comply with disclosure obligations.
